---
title: "Heeju Lim"
---

![](images/visa2.jpg){fig-align="left" width="300"}

## **Contact Information**

-   E-mail : [heeju.lim\@uconn.edu](mailto:heeju.lim@uconn.edu) 

 

## **Current Status**


-   **Ph.D Student in [Department of Statistics, University of Connecticut](https://stat.uconn.edu/)**

    Advisor : [Victor Hugo Lachos](https://hlachos.stat.uconn.edu/)

## **Educational History**

-   Sep. 2019 - Present, University of Connecticut, Ph.D Student in Statistics.

    (an academic leave of absence - May. 2021 \~ Aug. 2023)


-   Mar. 2015 - Feb. 2017, Korea University, M.S. in Statistics. (Advisor : Yousung Park)  

    - Heeju Lim. A study on financial stability through the estimation of child education and childcare budget, workers' compensation insurance, and employment insurance.  Korea University. 2017. Seoul [http://www.riss.kr/link?id=T14435637 ](http://www.riss.kr/link?id=T14435637)

-   Mar. 2010 - Feb. 2015, Sejong University, B.S. in Statistics. (Advisor : Seungyeon Lee)

## **[Publication](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Heeju-Lim)**

-   Jae Seung Kang, Taesung Park, Youngmin Han, Seungyeon Lee, Heeju Lim, Hyeongseok Kim, Se Hyung Kim, Wooil Kwon, Sun-Whe Kim and Jin-Young Jang. (2019). Clinical validation of the 2017 international consensus guidelines on intraductal papillary mucinous neoplasm of the pancreas. Annals of Surgical Treatment and Research, 97(2), 58-64. [doi:10.4174/astr.2019.97.2.58](http://doi.org/10.4174/astr.2019.97.2.58)

-   Lee S, Lim H. Review of statistical methods for survival analysis using genomic data. Genomics Inform. 2019;17(4):e41.[doi:10.5808/GI.2019.17.4.e41](https://doi.org/10.5808/GI.2019.17.4.e41)

## **Technical Skills**

-   Advance programming skills of R, SAS, Python and SQL

-   Advance technical skills of SPSS statistics and SPSS modeler

-   Moderate programming skills in HTML, C, JAVA

## **Certificates**

-   SAS Certified Base/Advanced Programmer for SAS 9, JUL 2015

-   Oracle Database 10g Administrator Certified Professional, SEP 2014

-   Oracle Database 12c Administrator Certified Professional, JAN 2016

## **Awards and Honors**

-   Scholarships for Internationalization, Korea Univ. Spring 2016

-   Academic Research Scholarships, Korea Univ. Spring 2016, Fall 2015

-   BK21PLUS Scholarships, Korea Univ. Spring 2016, Fall 2015

-   Magna cum Laude, Sejong Univ. Spring 2015

-   Honors Scholarships, Sejong Univ. 2014, 2013, 2012, 2011

## **Teaching Assistant**

-   Introduction to Mathematical Statistics 2, UConn. Spring 2021

-   Introduction to Mathematical Statistics 1, UConn. Fall 2020

-   Bayesian Statistics, Sejong Univ. Fall 2018

-   Introduction to Database(mySQL), Korea Univ. Fall 2015

-   Introduction to C-Programming, Korea Univ. Spring 2015

-   Mathematical Statistics 2, Sejong Univ. Fall 2014

## **Work and Research Experience**

-   **Korea University (Oct 2022 - March 2023)**

    Data Scientist in the department of Convergence and Open Sharing System for New Energy Industry

    Developed a course-recommender system and the student-activity prediction modeling based on machine learning and deep learninng algorithms and Natural Language Processing

-   **National Tax Service of the Republic of Korea (Apr 2022 - Sep 2022)**

    Statistician in the department of National Tax data

-   **University of Connecticut (Aug 2019 - May 2021)**

    Webmaster in the department of Statistics and [New England Statistical Society(NESS)](https://nestat.org/about/it-team/)

    Organized [the 4th Stat4Onc Annual Symposium](https://events.stat4onc.org/stat4onc2021/) 
    
    NextGen : [Data Science Day(2020)](https://nestat.org/nextgen/dsd2020/) and  [NextGen : Data Science Day(2019)](https://nestat.org/nextgen/dsd2019/) 

-   **Sejong University (Sep 2018 - Jun 2019)**

    Full-time Researcher in Biostatistics laboratory

-   **DATASOLUTION inc. - Formerly SPSS Korea (Mar 2017 - Sep 2017)**

    ata Analyst in the department of Consulting Business HQ
